lastReleaseMessage: 100-polish pass: mobile/iOS meta, save indicator, keyboard shortcuts (?, Esc, Ctrl+K/S, Alt+1-4), help dialog, accordion polish, Layout Designer micro-interactions, library tile polish, color popover a11y, auto-grow textareas, visibility-change persist, responsive breakpoints down to 380px, hover-none/reduced-motion/high-contrast support

barRaise.topFinding: Holding at at-risk, one quiet day from stalled. Nothing has shipped since v0.16.0 (de4fe25, 2026-06-06); the last commit is two days back and both open HIGHs are untouched. scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes barRaise=null, audit.findings=0/0/0, and workQueueDepth=0 (lines 94, 99-107), so the clobber gun is still loaded for the next release. The work queue still holds 17 pending yaa/apo items, oldest 21 days. The only movement is the wrong way: the tree went dirty again (data/aliases.json uncommitted, the 06-07 report never committed), the same uncommitted-pile pattern that caused the earlier stall. The label engine stays healthy; the whole risk surface is the dashboard-writeback, work-queue, and docs perimeter.
